awards.title: Dell Game Changers Award
awards.description: Recognized for 99.6% runtime improvement and significant effort reduction in the global tax exemption platform.

awards.title: Times Group Double Promotion
awards.description: Recognized for outstanding contribution to the nationwide launch and scaling of Planet M across 100+ stores and 20+ cities.

awards.title: YSEC Performance Award
awards.description: Recognized for delivery of 10+ enterprise platforms with a 100% on-time record across international clients and geographies.

awards.title: Dell Learning Exchange Rockstar
awards.description: Recognized for exceptional learning contributions and knowledge sharing across Dell's global employee community.
